MessageStrip.text: Governance OData is not available. Overview counts and lists stay empty until the shell exposes the governance V4 service.
No rows were returned: connect OData, authenticate, and seed HANA, or add records from the other admin pages. Counts are live when non-zero.
Select a row, then Test connection, then Sync tools. Sync is enabled only when Health is OK (strict policy B.3). CAP actions update HANA and call the MCP. Wide tables scroll horizontally below.
Governance OData is not available. The MCP list cannot load until the shell model is bound to /odata/v4/governance.

Table.noDataText: No MCP servers in governance. Use Add server or check OData and HANA.

MessageStrip.text: Filters combine with AND. Search matches tool or MCP server name (also AND with dropdowns). Server list is filled from McpServers (name) when OData is available.
Governance OData is not available. The tools list and server filter options cannot load until the shell model is bound.

Table.noDataText: No tools match the current filters, or the catalog is empty. Adjust filters or check governance data.

ObjectStatus.tooltip: Inherits parent MCP last known health. Re-run Test connection on the MCP if status is wrong (no per-tool state stored).

MessageStrip.text: Status and model filters use distinct values from the Agents OData set (plus All). Search matches name, model profile, or identity. The Dept gate column is not on the Agent entity yet — use access groups for claims.
Governed procedure packs: skills load from Governance OData (HANA). CRUD uses the same service.

Single governance map (replaces a separate Agent ↔ tools page): Direct tool = AgentTool allowlist; Via skill = AgentSkill procedure + tool context at runtime. Filter Route = Direct tool to see allowlist-only rows. OData wiring still uses AgentTools + AgentSkills entities.
Line icon reflects parent MCP health (no separate tool liveness in DB). Use MCP servers to re-test. Risk / lifecycle are governed in HANA.

TextArea.placeholder: From MCP sync; edit for admin notes

Text.text: Assign or remove tools on Agent ↔ skills ↔ tools. Dept gate is not stored on Agent; use access groups.

Input.placeholder: Short title for admins and progressive disclosure

TextArea.placeholder: Shown to the planner with the skill list (metadata only)
Full procedure — loaded on demand at runtime in target stack

MessageStrip.text: This dialog is a template preview only — values are not claim entities until AgentGroupClaimValue / membership are wired. Save on an empty template does not persist.

TextArea.placeholder: Comma-separated values (stored on group description until claim entities exist)
Comma-separated agent display names (not persisted yet)
